React Beginner to Advanced Series — Part 6A
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Non-member ? click here to read.
If you’ve followed this series from the beginning, you’ve already built a strong foundation.
So far, you’ve learned:

• What React is and why it was created.

• How to set up a React project using Vite.

• How JSX describes user interfaces.

• How Components help us build reusable UI.

• How Props allow components to receive dynamic data.
At this point, you can build clean and reusable user interfaces.
But there’s one major limitation.
Everything you’ve built so far is static.
The UI can display different information through Props, but it cannot remember anything or react to user interactions.
Let’s understand why.
Imagine You’re Shopping Online…
You open your favorite e-commerce website.
You find a laptop you like and click:
Add to Cart
